heading: Attributes
body:
It has the following attributes:

| Name           | Type   | Required? | Description                                                                          |
| -------------- | ------ | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| type           | string | yes       | Human-readable label that identifies this tokenizer type. Value must be uaxUrlEmail. |
| maxTokenLength | int    | no        | Maximum number of characters in one token.Default: 255                               |
